# WOWOHCOOL — OEM/ODM Charging Solutions Manufacturer (Full Context)

> Professional OEM/ODM manufacturer of wireless chargers, power banks, GaN chargers, and car chargers. ISO 9001 certified factory in Shenzhen, China since 2013. Specializing in semi-solid-state battery technology, GaN V charging, and Qi2 wireless charging. Serving 200+ global brands including Bosch and Jacob Jensen. Factory-direct pricing with MOQ starting at 500 units.

## Company Profile

- **Legal Name:** Dong Yi Technology Co., Ltd
- **Brand:** WOWOHCOOL
- **Founded:** 2013
- **Location:** 925, Yichuang International Center, Longhua District, Shenzhen, Guangdong, China 518111
- **Facility:** 5,000 sqm manufacturing plant
- **Employees:** 200-500 (50+ R&D engineers)
- **Monthly Capacity:** 1,000,000+ units
- **Certifications:** ISO 9001, CE, FCC, RoHS, Qi2 (WPC), UL, PSE, KC, UN38.3, E-Mark
- **Clients:** Bosch, Jacob Jensen, 200+ global brands
- **Total Units Shipped:** 10,000,000+
- **Payment Terms:** T/T 30/70, L/C available
- **Sample Turnaround:** 3-7 days
- **Lead Time (OEM):** 25-30 days after sample approval
- **Lead Time (ODM):** 45-60 days from design approval
- **Warranty:** 12-24 months
- **Shipping:** FOB Shenzhen, EXW, DDP door-to-door, Amazon FBA fulfillment

## Key Differentiators

- **Semi-solid-state battery technology (CES 2026 featured):** 50% thinner than Li-polymer, 30% higher energy density, zero thermal runaway risk, 800-1,200 cycle life, -20°C to 60°C operating range
- **GaN V (5th generation):** 40% smaller than silicon, 30% better heat dissipation, switching frequency up to 500kHz, PD 3.1 support up to 240W
- **Qi2 MPP certified:** 15W universal fast charging with N52H neodymium magnets, backward compatible with Qi devices
- **10+ years specialized in charging only** (not a general electronics factory)
- **End-to-end OEM/ODM:** ID design -> PCBA engineering -> tooling -> mass production -> certification support
- **4-stage QC:** IQC (Incoming), IPQC (In-process), FQC (Final), OQC (Outgoing), 100% 4-hour aging test

## Product Families

### Power Banks
**Page:** https://www.wowohcool.com/products/power-bank
**Technology:** Semi-solid-state & Li-polymer
**Specifications:**
- Capacity range: 5,000mAh - 27,000mAh (99.9Wh airline-safe)
- Power Delivery: PD 3.1 up to 140W
- Wireless: Qi2.2 up to 15W
- Features: Semi-solid-state battery, built-in cables, TFT display, 2-in-1 hybrid (wall charger + power bank)
- Safety: UN38.3 certified, over-temperature protection, short-circuit protection
- Customization: CMF (color, material, finish), logo printing, retail packaging
- MOQ: 500 units (ODM) / 2,000 units (OEM)
- Key models: WOP67 (45W 2-in-1), semi-solid-state series

### GaN Chargers
**Page:** https://www.wowohcool.com/products/gan-charger
**Technology:** GaN V (5th generation Gallium Nitride)
**Specifications:**
- Power range: 20W - 240W PD 3.1
- Port configurations: Single USB-C, 2C, 2C+1A, 3C+1A
- Features: Retractable cable options, power strips with USB-C PD, GaN V (40% smaller than silicon)
- Safety: 10-layer circuit protection, over-temperature control
- Standards: PD 3.1, PPS, QC 5.0
- Certifications: CE, FCC, RoHS, E-Mark (automotive)
- Customization: Cable color/length, logo, packaging, port configuration
- MOQ: 500 units (ODM) / 2,000 units (OEM)

### Wireless Chargers
**Page:** https://www.wowohcool.com/products/wireless-charger
**Technology:** Qi2 MPP (Magnetic Power Profile), Qi2.2
**Specifications:**
- Output: 15W MPP (universal fast charging), 25W for compatible devices
- Magnets: N52H grade neodymium (strongest commercial grade)
- Product line: 10 models including 3-in-1 folding stations, wine glass 360° design, car magnetic with TEC cooling, zinc alloy docks, night-light stations, active cooling MagStations
- Compatibility: iPhone 15/16/17 series, Samsung Galaxy S24/S25, Google Pixel 9, Xiaomi Mi 14/15, AirPods, Apple Watch, Galaxy Buds
- Certifications: CE, FCC, RoHS, Qi2 WPC
- Features: FOD (Foreign Object Detection), thermal management, magnetic alignment
- Material options: ABS+PC, aluminum alloy, zinc alloy, glass
- MOQ: 500 units (ODM) / 2,000 units (OEM)

### Car Chargers
**Page:** https://www.wowohcool.com/products/car-charger
**Technology:** GaN V
**Specifications:**
- Power: PD 3.1 up to 140W (front), 30W (secondary port)
- Input: 12V-24V (compatible with cars, trucks, RVs, boats)
- Features: Auto-retractable 0.8m USB-C cable, digital voltage display, intelligent power allocation
- Certifications: E-Mark, CE, FCC, RoHS
- Safety: Over-voltage, over-current, over-temperature, short-circuit protection
- Customization: Cable length, logo, packaging
- MOQ: 500 units (ODM) / 2,000 units (OEM)

### 2-in-1 Hybrid Chargers
- Wall charger + 10,000mAh power bank in one device
- GaN technology for compact form factor
- Dual-mode operation: wall charging and portable battery

### Heating Apparel Batteries
- 7.4V/12.6V DC output for heated clothing
- Multi-cell protection, weather-resistant casing
- Custom connector types available

### Power Strips with USB-C PD
- Desktop power strips with 65W USB-C PD
- GaN compact design
- Multi-port: USB-C + USB-A + AC outlets

## OEM/ODM Service Process

**Page:** https://www.wowohcool.com/service

1. **Inquiry & Requirements:** Submit product specifications, target MOQ, budget, and timeline. Team response within 24 hours.
2. **Design & Quotation:** R&D team creates ID designs and PCBA schematics with detailed quotation (tooling, unit pricing, lead time).
3. **Tooling & Sample:** Custom molds for ODM (25-35 days), standard samples for OEM (7-15 days).
4. **Sample Approval:** Functional testing, certification pre-compliance (CE, FCC, RoHS, Qi2), 4-hour aging test.
5. **Mass Production:** 4-stage QC (IQC/IPQC/FQC/OQC), 100% aging test before packing.
6. **Shipping:** FOB Shenzhen, EXW, DDP door-to-door. Delivery 25-30 days after sample approval.

## Certifications (Detail)

| Certification | Market | Details |
|---|---|---|
| CE | European Union | EMC + LVD compliance |
| FCC | United States | Part 15 wireless compliance |
| RoHS | Global | Hazardous substance restriction |
| Qi2 (WPC) | Global | Wireless Power Consortium certified |
| UL | United States | Safety standard certification |
| PSE | Japan | Electrical appliance safety |
| KC | South Korea | Safety and EMC compliance |
| UN38.3 | Global | Battery transport safety |
| E-Mark | EU/UNECE | Automotive electronics |
| ISO 9001 | Global | Quality management system |

## Key Statistics

- 13+ years of manufacturing experience (since 2013)
- 10M+ total units shipped globally
- 200+ brand clients worldwide
- 5,000 sqm ISO 9001 certified facility
- 50+ in-house R&D engineers
- 1M+ monthly production capacity
- 4-stage QC with 100% aging test
- 47+ Qi-certified models
- 24-hour response guarantee for inquiries

## Case Studies
- **Bosch** — 10,000 units of 65W GaN car chargers delivered on emergency fast-track timeline (5-day sample turnaround). Pre-sale campaign met with zero delays. https://www.wowohcool.com/case-studies
- **Jacob Jensen** — Complex ODM challenge solved: integrated infrared and touch dual-sensing into compact wireless car mount. 6,000 units delivered with zero defects. https://www.wowohcool.com/case-studies

## Blog Articles (Summaries)

### Sourcing & Factory Verification
- **How to Choose a Reliable China Charger Supplier** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/choose-reliable-china-charger-supplier) — Complete guide to finding, verifying, and negotiating with Chinese charger manufacturers. Covers factory audits, certification verification, QC capability assessment, communication best practices, and red flags to watch for during supplier evaluation.
- **Factory Verification Checklist** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/factory-verification-checklist) — Step-by-step audit checklist for verifying Chinese electronics factories before placing orders. Includes document verification, facility inspection, QC process review, and sample evaluation criteria.
- **How to Choose a Wireless Charger Factory** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/how-to-choose-factory) — Qi2 audit guide: FOD testing procedures, coil quality assessment, thermal management evaluation, and WPC membership verification for wireless charger manufacturing partners.
- **Top 10 Power Bank Manufacturers in China** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/top-power-bank-manufacturers-china) — Ranked comparison of top Chinese power bank OEM/ODM factories evaluated on production capacity, QC standards, technical capability, certification support, and client reputation.
- **Quality Control Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/quality-control-guide) — 4-stage QC methodology, 4-hour aging test protocols, defect rate targets (AQL standards), and compliance documentation requirements for charger manufacturing.

### OEM/ODM & Manufacturing
- **OEM vs ODM Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/oem-vs-odm-guide) — Compare OEM (original equipment manufacturing, logo/package customization) vs ODM (original design manufacturing, full product development) models for charging products. Cost comparison, timeline analysis, and decision framework.
- **GaN V Charger OEM Manufacturing** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/gan-v-charger-oem-manufacturing) — Technical guide to OEM/ODM GaN V charger production with PD 3.1 support. Covers GaN V circuit design considerations, thermal management, certification requirements, and supply chain status.
- **Semi-Solid-State Power Bank OEM** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/semi-solid-state-power-bank-oem) — Complete OEM guide for semi-solid-state battery power banks. Technology overview, manufacturing requirements, safety advantages, and OEM sourcing checklist.
- **Hotel Charging Solutions** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/hotel-charging-solutions) — Custom-branded 3-in-1 charging stations for the hospitality industry. Embedded mounting options, custom faceplates, and bulk ordering for hotel chains.

### Technical Guides
- **GaN Chargers Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/gan-chargers-guide) — How GaN technology replaces silicon in chargers: benefits (size, efficiency, heat), comparisons with silicon, power level recommendations, and OEM sourcing guidance.
- **GaN Generations Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/gan-generations-guide) — Comparison of GaN I through GaN V across switching frequency, efficiency, cost, and size. Decision framework for selecting the right GaN generation for different product tiers.
- **USB-C PD Fast Charging Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/usb-c-pd-fast-charging-guide) — Complete guide to USB-C Power Delivery 3.1, PPS (Programmable Power Supply), wattage tiers (18W-240W), device compatibility, and OEM implementation considerations.
- **Power Bank Specs Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/power-bank-specs-guide) — Understanding mAh vs Wh, PD wattage tiers, cell types (Li-polymer vs semi-solid-state), power bank safety specs, and airline travel regulations.
- **Qi2 vs MagSafe Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/qi2-vs-magsafe-guide) — In-depth comparison of Qi2, MagSafe, and legacy Qi wireless charging standards for B2B buyers. Speed, certification costs, device compatibility, and product planning recommendations.
- **How Wireless Charging Works** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/wireless-charging-works) — Science of electromagnetic induction, Qi2 MPP magnetic alignment, FOD (Foreign Object Detection), thermal management in wireless charging, and efficiency optimization.
- **Car Charger Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/car-charger-guide) — How to choose GaN car chargers for B2B buyers: PD 3.1 capability, retractable cable options, safety certifications, fleet management applications, and OEM sourcing.

### Certifications & Compliance
- **US & EU Charger Certification Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/certifications-us-eu-guide) — UL, CE, FCC, RoHS requirements for importing chargers to US and EU markets. Certification process timelines, testing costs, and common compliance pitfalls.
- **Charger Safety Standards** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/charger-safety-standards) — IEC 62368-1, UL 62368-1, EN 62368-1 standards overview. Safety certification process for chargers, thermal testing, and documentation requirements.
- **Qi Certification Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/qi-certification-guide) — Complete guide to Qi/Qi2 certification: WPC membership, testing process, costs (est. $5,000-$15,000), timeline (8-12 weeks), and authorized lab list.

### Import & Logistics
- **Import Costs Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/import-costs-guide) — HS Code classification for chargers (8504.40), import duties by region (US 0-2.5%, EU 0-3.7%), VAT rates, and landed cost calculation methodology for importing from China.
- **Shipping from China Guide** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/shipping-from-china-guide) — Sea freight (LCL/FCL), air freight, express courier (DHL/FedEx/UPS), FOB vs CIF vs DDP incoterms comparison, customs clearance procedures, and shipping documentation checklist.

### Industry Analysis (New)
- **2026 Charging Accessory Market Trends** (https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/charging-accessory-market-trends-2026) — Comprehensive market trends analysis: GaN V at 35% market share, Qi2 in 60%+ flagship smartphones, semi-solid-state battery commercialization, PD 3.1 ecosystem expansion, and B2B sourcing implications for 2026-2027 product planning.
